creator: yzrh@noema.org
text:
If PDF contains jbig2 images,  pages with jbig2 images
will not render.  Maybe jbig2dec was updated without
bumping portrevision of mupdf?

Error message:

MESA-LOADER: failed to retrieve device information
warning: jbig2dec error: incompatible jbig2dec header (0.18) and library (0.19) versions (segment -1)                          
error: cannot allocate jbig2 context
